title: Protest Death Toll Estimates Reach 36,500
detail: Iran International reports leaked documents showing the protest death toll may be as high as 36,500, including 30,304 deaths registered in civilian hospitals during the January 8-9 massacre alone. The Iranian government maintains its official figure of 3,117 and labels many of the dead 'terrorists.' The revelation deepens international outrage and strengthens calls for intervention.

title: Iran Warns US Against Military Action
detail: Iran's Supreme National Security Council issues a formal warning to the United States, declaring that any military action would be met with 'devastating retaliation across the entire region.' The statement comes as the Lincoln carrier strike group approaches the Persian Gulf and F-35s arrive at forward bases. Russia and China call for de-escalation.

title: Reports of Israeli Electronic Interference in Iran
detail: Multiple reports emerge of IRGC surveillance drones crashing or making emergency landings over protest sites, with analysts attributing the failures to localized electronic jamming linked to Mossad operations inside Iran. Tehran had previously announced the seizure of 'advanced electronic equipment' in Mashhad and Rasht on January 13, claiming the tools were used to 'blind' tactical drones.
